hotel_name: Banana Island Resort Doha by Anantara
raw_description:
Situated on Banana Island, a 30-minute luxury ferry ride from Doha, the resort features 800-metre private beach, Anantara Spa, 6 dining options. A new Adventure Park and a cinema theatre are also available for guests’ entertainment.

The elegant accommodations are decorated with Arabic design and features a view of the Arabian Sea. Each includes a flat-screen TV, an outdoor seating area and a minibar. The villas feature a large living room and private pool. The bathroom has Anantara signature amenities, a bathtub, and a shower.

Savoury dining options includes Riva a contemporary Italian restaurant that serves delectable fresh seafood and meat dishes in a trattoria setting. Al Nahham serves Middle Eastern cuisine with panoramic view over Doha skyline. Exotic mocktails are served by the pool bar.

A padel court, mini-golf course and a tennis court are available near the property. To keep the younger guests entertained, Cool Mint Children’s Club and Peppermint Teens’ Club have a wide range of toys and interactive games.

Guests can visit the Corniche promenade and Souq Waqif which are 30 minutes from Banana Island by ferry. Doha’s Hamad International Airport is 11 kilometers away from the port. A luxury limousine service along with a catamaran ferry can be arranged with the hotel.

Ferry boat timings from al Shyoukh Port on the Corniche to the resort are from 9 am to 9 pm and from 9 am to 10.15 pm from the resort to the port.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it9.2for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Banana Island Resort Doha by Anantara. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 10 key amenities including 2 swimming pools, Airport shuttle, Free WiFi.
